ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the city is located */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the city above sea level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "weather_main" TEXT /* Main weather condition */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Detailed weather description */,
  "weather_icon" TEXT /* Icon representing the weather condition */,
  "condition_category" TEXT /* Category of the weather condition */,
  "condition_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "user_job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the weather data */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of accessing the weather data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being forecasted */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the weather forecast */,
  "forecast_temp" REAL /* Forecasted temperature in Kelvin */,
  "forecast_temp_min" REAL /* Forecasted minimum temperature in Kelvin */,
  "forecast_temp_max" REAL /* Forecasted maximum temperature in Kelvin */,
  "forecast_pressure" REAL /* Forecasted atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "forecast_humidity" REAL /* Forecasted humidity percentage */,
  "forecast_wind_speed" REAL /* Forecasted wind speed in m/s */,
  "forecast_wind_deg" REAL /* Forecasted wind direction in degrees */,
  "forecast_model" TEXT /* Forecasting model used */,
  "forecast_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the weather forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Status of the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_station_data" (
  "station_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station collecting the data */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being collected */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "data_temp" REAL /* Temperature in Kelvin */,
  "data_temp_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature in Kelvin */,
  "data_temp_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature in Kelvin */,
  "data_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "data_humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "data_wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in m/s */,
  "data_wind_deg" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_station_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_station_data_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellites" (
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite */,
  "satellite_name" TEXT /* Name of the satellite */,
  "satellite_type" TEXT /* Type of satellite */,
  "satellite_status" TEXT /* Status of the satellite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satellite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellite_data" (
  "satellite_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite data point */,
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the satellite collecting the data */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being collected */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "data_temp" REAL /* Temperature in Kelvin */,
  "data_temp_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature in Kelvin */,
  "data_temp_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature in Kelvin */,
  "data_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "data_humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "data_wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in m/s */,
  "data_wind_deg" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satellite_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_data_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_data_satellite_id FOREIGN KEY ("satellite_id") REFERENCES satellites ("satellite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "radars" (
  "radar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each radar */,
  "radar_name" TEXT /* Name of the radar */,
  "radar_type" TEXT /* Type of radar */,
  "radar_status" TEXT /* Status of the radar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("radar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "radar_data" (
  "radar_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each radar data point */,
  "radar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the radar collecting the data */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being collected */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "data_temp" REAL /* Temperature in Kelvin */,
  "data_temp_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature in Kelvin */,
  "data_temp_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature in Kelvin */,
  "data_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "data_humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "data_wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in m/s */,
  "data_wind_deg" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("radar_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_radar_data_radar_id FOREIGN KEY ("radar_id") REFERENCES radars ("radar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_radar_data_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)
